name: T&T - Trinkets and Trackers
description:
# Trinkets and Trackers

Trinkets and Trackers is a Roll20 Mod script for Dungeons and Dragons campaigns. It provides chat-based tools for inventory, item catalogs, shops, currency, and token actions.

Features:
* Chat-based command menus and action cards.
* Interactive inventory management for player characters and NPCs.
* Dynamic shops with prices, stock, visibility, purchases, and catalog import or export.
* Currency transfers using cp, sp, and gp.
* Item search, item details, item use, discarding, and token-to-token item transfers.
* Token management with generated token actions. In progress.
* Auto loot and rewards system. TBD.
* NPC management. TBD.
* World management. TBD.
* Campaign management. TBD.

Setup: use the Experimental API sandbox and create the required handouts named T&T Items Catalog, T&T Items Template, and T&T Shop Catalog.
